THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0: The great work is complete and I've come to realize that this is just a game.
Huh... You're right. Also it's still in early access so I can't let you proceed.
I understand. Take my memories so I can experience the novelty of the Spire again.
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.ancien: Here, take one of these forgotten gems with ya!
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: Keep the gems. That crate of tarnished green salts behind you — how much for those?
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.ancien: Ha! That's just junk gone rotten. Take the whole pile, it's stinking up the place!
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.char: [sine]'Rotten.' You say that like it isn't the entire point.[/sine]
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0r.ancie: Back for more of my rubbish? Go on, dig through the pile — take what speaks to ya!
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0.ancien: You never take the shiny ones. Always the cracked, the corroded, the spoiled. Why's that?
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1.char: Rot is just a transformation you haven't finished naming yet. Your 'junk' is halfway to gold.
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2.ancien: ...Huh. Been sitting on a fortune and calling it a mess. Ain't that always the way.
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: We've never met — though you speak as if we have. Hold still. Your decay is exquisitely slow. May I take a sample?
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0.char: You die a little with each blessing you give. And you return anyway. I know that arithmetic well.
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1.ancien: [sine]...to spend oneself..... is not..... to be spent.....[/sine]
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.a: Madness awaits at the top. Don my power and vanquish.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.c: Luck. You're offering me [i]luck[/i]. I control variables — I don't pray to them.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.a: And yet you crossed my path. Some call that fortune.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.c: [sine]...Coincidence. Well within the margin of error.[/sine]
The dice favor the bold, little chemist. Take a boon, and let chance do the rest.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0.a: Still tallying your odds? You measure the world down to the grain, and still it surprises you. Doesn't that delight you?
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1.c: ...It does. I'd never confess it in a lab. But the residue that defies the equation — that is the part worth living for.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2.a: Ha! There's a gambler in you yet.
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.anci: Try this!!! Very good finds!! Look, look!!
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: Black, then white, then gold, then red. You wear the whole Great Work on your hide — and you don't even know it.
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.anci: Pretty colors!! You like?? Take, take!!
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0r.anc: Color friend!! New shiny for you!! Take take!!
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0.anci: You name my colors! Nigredo! Albedo! Funny words!! What they mean??
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1.char: The stages a thing passes through as it is perfected. Rot, then purity, then dawn, then completion. You are the whole process, wearing a grin.
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2.anci: I am PERFECT?? Hehe!! I knew it!! Take extra shiny!!
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.ancien: [thinky_dots]Welcome back, friend. Let my flesh help you...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: We haven't met — but I'll take the offer as sincere. You'd render yourself down for a stranger. So do I; I simply use poison instead of warmth.
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.ancien: [thinky_dots]...then we are... the same recipe... friend...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.char: [sine]Distilled from opposite fires. But yes. The same.[/sine]
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0r.ancie: [thinky_dots]Take a piece of me with you... it is warm, still...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0.char: You could stop melting, you know. Bank the heat. Preserve yourself.
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1.ancien:
[thinky_dots]Why keep what is meant to be given...?
I am content, little chemist. Are you...?[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.ancien: GROW STRONGER SO WE CAN FIGHT!!!
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: I don't carry weapons. I carry doses. Would you like to be stronger — or poisoned? The procedure is identical.
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0r.ancie: WEAPONS!! TAKE A WEAPON!! POISON IT NEXT TIME!!!
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1.char: I'd win — not with strength, but with patience. You'd be dead by turn six and never land a blow.
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2.ancien: ...HAHAHA!! A SLOW DEATH IS STILL A GLORIOUS DEATH!! TAKE THIS, YOU CREEPY LITTLE FROG!!
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.a: Do come in, dear! What can Tezcatara do for you today?
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.c: You burn away what's impure. My trade calls that [i]calcination[/i] — the first step of the Work. I've been hunting a proper flame.
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.a: Oh, a flatterer! Hand me your flaws, little spark, and let me [jitter][b]burn[/b][/jitter] them clean.
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.c: [sine]Gently. I've grown fond of a few of them.[/sine]
Back so soon, dearie? Come, feed the fire — let me take another burden off you.
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0.a: You alchemists. Always [jitter][b]burning[/b][/jitter], distilling, purifying. You'd have made a darling apprentice.
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1.c: You flatter the method, not me. But I'll take the compliment — and the flame.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.ancie: Look at you, cooking poison in your own veins. Why suffer for scraps? Sign right here and I'll get you some [sine]real[/sine] power.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: Power without the process is just a loan. I'd rather earn the gold than be handed counterfeit.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.ancie: Everyone says that. Right up until the last floor. First taste's [jitter][b]free[/b][/jitter], chemist — for when you get desperate.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0r.anci: Back already? No signature, no soul — but hey, browse the samples. On the house.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0.ancie: You poison yourself daily and call [i]me[/i] the demon. That's rich.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1.char: The difference is precision. I know exactly what my poison costs, down to the milligram. Your deals never come itemized.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2.ancie: ...Fine print's just a formality. But I'll admit — you'd read it. Pity. You'd have made a [sine]magnificent[/sine] tyrant.
